_note: Top-level catalog landing pages for each LPBF vendor. The skill discovers actual TDS file URLs from these — do NOT hardcode tds_link URLs here. Add/edit URLs as vendors reorganize their sites.

eos._orientation: material-first (each category page lists machines per material)

ge_additive._orientation: machine-first (each printer page lists materials supported)

three_d_systems._note: 3D Systems' /material-finder is a JS-rendered SPA AND has Cloudflare-style bot protection — both urllib and WebFetch return 403 for it. /materials/metal works via WebFetch but only lists 8 category labels (no per-material TDS URLs). Sitemap intentionally omits metal materials. There is no usable catalog crawl path. The skill keeps a known-good TDS URL list below as a fallback; periodically (every quarter or so) somebody needs to manually verify these via WebFetch and refresh additions/removals.
three_d_systems._fallback_note: Maintained manually. Visit https://www.3dsystems.com/material-finder?type[0]=Metal in a real browser periodically and refresh this list. Last refresh: 2026-05-23. Excluded marketing brochures (aerospace-brochure etc.) — TDS PDFs only.

nikon._orientation: material-first (each category page lists machines + downloadable MDS PDFs)

blt._orientation: single-page list of per-material catalogue cards; each card links to /powder/<slug>/
blt._extraction_method: Vision OCR on per-material summary image (PDF TDS is gated behind contact form). Each /powder/<slug>/ page embeds a <slug>_2-<W>x<H>.png chart showing particle-size cuts + flow + sphericity + oxygen + UTS/YS/elong range. Requires browser User-Agent and a Referer header to download the image — bare requests get 404. See references/blt.md.

_fetch_headers.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

blt._value_convention: BLT publishes mechanical values as ranges (lo-hi). The skill stores the midpoint in the standard yield_MPa / uts_xy_MPa / elongation_pct fields and preserves the raw lo/hi pair in vendor_entry._value_ranges. Mechanical values apply to the annealed condition for every powder EXCEPT 420 stainless (hardened, HRC 50-58 → HV via ASTM E140).
